testcase.name: test_register_with_valid_referral_code
testcase.error: tests/test_referrals.py:154: in setup assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"Too many requests. Please try again later.","retry_after":60} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_register_with_invalid_referral_code
testcase.error: tests/test_referrals.py:154: in setup assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"Too many requests. Please try again later.","retry_after":60} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_register_without_referral_code
testcase.error: tests/test_referrals.py:154: in setup assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"Too many requests. Please try again later.","retry_after":60} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
